summary: Implementation review accepts repair draft, overlay/fork, package update acceptance, and sensitive material validator changes as bounded Stage 5 Lode facts.
reviewed_validation_summary: loom fact-chain --target . --json; loom verify --target . --json; git diff --check passed locally before retire PR. Loom verify reports Codex plugin runtime cache stale while CLI/source payload is 0.28.0; treated as host runtime cache surface, not repo code.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The change exposes refs-only repair and overlay/fork facts without claiming runtime execution, hosted registry, marketplace, App install truth, Core run truth, Harbor private evidence, or true write behavior.

implementation_review_disposition.reason: Carrier closeout returns the current pointer to no_active_item after merged repair draft facts and issue closeout; no product or package truth changes are included.
